name: obsidian-ai-chat
description: Chat with LLMs from a sidebar panel in Obsidian using OpenRouter or ChatGPT via Codex OAuth.

scripts.test: npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/DiffService.test.ts && npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/mcp.test.ts && npx ts-node src/__tests__/FileChangeParser.test.ts && npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/CodexCli.test.ts && npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/CodexModels.test.ts && npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/fileChangeDetection.test.ts && npx ts-node -O '{"module":"CommonJS"}' src/__tests__/VaultRAGService.test.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH:?Set OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH}" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "$OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH"

author: Keiwan Jamaly
